ChatGPT vs Gemini (2026): Which Should You Use?

ChatGPT and Gemini are both popular tools in the AI Chatbots & Assistants space. Here's how they compare.

ChatGPTGemini
MakerOpenAIGoogle
PricingFree plan available; Plus $20/mo; Pro $200/moFree plan available; Gemini Advanced from $19.99/mo (via Google One AI Premium)
Free tierYesYes
Best forGeneral-purpose assistant for writing, brainstorming, coding, and quick research.Users already inside the Google Workspace / Android ecosystem.

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.
